products.title: Minty Polka
products.body_html:
Details

Length: 1.00 m (100.00 cm) ; Width: 1.11 m (111.00 cm)

Fabric: Viscose Blend

Wash Care: Gentle Hand Wash

Note : Price as per one meter

Disclaimer: The pictures are clicked in daylight. Color may vary slightly from the image due to the screen brightness

Description

Viscose is produced from regenerated cellulose. It is a versatile fabric known for its softness, breathability and drape. It can be dyed easily and is often used as a substitute for natural silk or cotton. It is comfortable and has a beautiful sheen.

products.title: Rose Petal Honey
products.body_html:
Details

Length: 1.00 m (100.00 cm) ; Width: 1.16 m (116.00 cm)

Fabric: Viscose Organza With Zari

Wash Care: Gentle Hand Wash

Note : Price as per one meter

Disclaimer: The pictures are clicked in daylight. Color may vary slightly from the image due to the screen brightness

Description

Viscose is a biodegradable, sustainable fabric that is made using the viscose fibre. It is a man-made, manufactured fibre of cellulose origin that is produced using fully natural materials, contrary to popular beliefs, and the final product is very similar to naturally occurring fibres such as cotton in terms of look and feel. The fabric is versatile, drapes beautifully, has an added sheen to it that lends a beautiful touch and its soft texture makes it a delight to wear.

Light as air and translucent like a rainbow, organza silk is a fabric that exudes delicate grandeur. Woven with twisted silk yarn on the warp as well as the weft, this fabric is hailed for its slight transparency and its slightly stiff and yet fluid texture. The slight sheen adds to its charisma, making it the perfect saree to drape for both festive and formal occasions.

products.title: Red Tulip
products.body_html:
Details

Length: 1.00 m (100.00 cm) ; Width: 1.05 m (105.00 cm)

Fabric: Poly Cotton

Wash Care: Gentle Hand Wash

Note : Price as per one meter

Disclaimer: The pictures are clicked in daylight. Color may vary slightly from the image due to the screen brightness

Description

Poly-cotton is blend of cotton and polyester. One of the most popular natural fibres in the world, cotton is hailed for its beauty, comfort, durability and versatility. Cotton is naturally sustainable and its cultivation supports local farmers and communities. A low maintenance fabric, cotton is also hypoallergenic, making it the perfect choice around the year, especially for the Indian climate. Poly-cotton combines the comfort of cotton with the fluidity and durability of polyester to create a stylish but imminently wearable fabric.

products.title: Jasmine Sugar Syrup
products.body_html:
Details

Length: 1.00 m (100.00 cm) ; Width: 1.13 m (113.00 cm)

Fabric: Polyester

Wash Care: Gentle Hand Wash

Note : Price as per one meter

Disclaimer: The pictures are clicked in daylight. Color may vary slightly from the image due to the screen brightness

Description

Polyester is a synthetically manufactured fabric that is woven along with natural fibres for durability and a characteristic smoothness. The combination of cotton and polyester results in a fabric that has the strengths of both types of fibres.

products.title: Dalchini Cashew Mousse
products.body_html:
Details

Length: 1.00 m (100.00 cm) ; Width: 1.16 m (116.00 cm)

Fabric: Artificial Silk

Wash Care: Gentle Hand Wash

Note : Price as per one meter

Disclaimer: The pictures are clicked in daylight. Color may vary slightly from the image due to the screen brightness

Description

Artificial silk is composed of any synthetic fibre, which mimics real silk in terms of its texture and appearance. It could be composed of bamboo viscose, or soybean fibres, or synthetic fibres such as nylon, polyester. Besides the above, it can also be made of semi-synthetic materials such as rayon, and mercerised cotton.

products.title: Checkered Pearl
products.body_html:
Details

Length: 1.00 m (100.00 cm) ; Width: 1.13 m (113.00 cm)

Fabric: Silk

Wash Care: Gentle Hand Wash

Note : Price as per one meter

Disclaimer: The pictures are clicked in daylight. Color may vary slightly from the image due to the screen brightness

Description

Silk exudes a regality that very few other fabrics can match. The brilliant shine that vibrates from a silk saree spells class and traditional beauty. India is one of the top producers of silk in the world and the fabric is always in demand for its visual attractiveness. People associate silk with special occasions and richness. Silk is alluring and can boast of a grand appeal as well as a tinge of nostalgia. On the whole, silk is a fabric that can never go wrong.

products.title: Sunflower in Shadow
products.body_html:
Details

Length: 5.50 m (550.00 cm) ; Width: 1.20 m (120 cm)

Blouse Piece: No

Wash Care: Dry Wash

Fabric: Mul Cotton

Blouse: The mannequin is wearing a blouse from our inhouse collection.

Disclaimer: The pictures are clicked in daylight. Colour may vary slightly from the image due to the screen brightness.

Description

The mul cotton is what we call ˜made in heaven at Suta. Known in West Bengal as mul mul, the fabric is buttery soft and delicately beautiful. The weave of this fabric is very fine, and this lends a very fluid texture to it that makes draping it a breeze. It is truly like a hug that wraps you in its love!

products.title: Petals of the Midnight Sun
products.body_html:
Details

Length: 5.50 m (550.00 cm) Width: 1.20 m (120 cm)

Blouse Piece: No

Wash Care: Dry Wash

Fabric: Cotton Linen

Blouse: The mannequin is wearing a blouse from our inhouse collection.

Disclaimer:The pictures are clicked in daylight. Colour may vary slightly from the image due to the screen brightness.

Description

Linen is considered the strongest of all natural fibres. Linen garments, therefore, are the perfect addition to conscious wardrobes. Made from the stalks of flax plants, linen has a low environmental impact and the production process is significantly less water intensive. As a natural fibre, linen is biodegradable. It is also breathable and very absorbent.

products.title: Golden Bloom in Black
products.body_html:
Details

Length: 5.50 m (550.00 cm) Width: 1.20 m (120 cm)

Blouse Piece: No

Wash Care: Dry Wash

Fabric: Cotton Slub

Blouse: The mannequin is wearing a blouse from our inhouse collection.

Disclaimer:The pictures are clicked in daylight. Colour may vary slightly from the image due to the screen brightness.

Description

Cotton is celebrated for its natural softness and breathability, making it a cherished fabric in the world of textiles. Cotton slub takes this classic material a step further with its distinctive, textured surface and charming irregularities. Created through a special twisting process before weaving, cotton slub features subtle variations that add visual and tactile intrigue. This unique texture enhances the elegance of sarees, offering a blend of natural comfort and individual character that elevates each piece into a statement of refined style.
